name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly restructures the workflow. While some tasks overlap (e.g., stability analysis, numerical simulations, plotting), the new plan redefines the scope and order of these tasks (e.g., combining plotting steps, changing the order of parameter sweeps, and refining the theoretical derivation focus). Since the new plan is a complete reorganization of the research and engineering workflow, it is safer to restart from the beginning to ensure consistency with the new structure.
